company.name: ADNOC
company.legalName: Abu Dhabi National Oil Company P.J.S.C.
company.dashboardBasis: Public disclosure proxy for ADNOC Group
company.proxyEntity: ADNOC Gas PLC; the closest continuously disclosed, listed ADNOC subsidiary

coverage.availabilityNote: ADNOC P.J.S.C. does not publish a stable ten-year consolidated financial series. ADNOC Gas PLC is used as the closest official public proxy. FY2022-FY2025 actuals are cross-checked against a primary annual/integrated report and an official full-year results document. FY2026 includes only official guidance values; unavailable guidance is left blank.

metrics.basis: ADNOC Gas PLC adjusted/pro-forma historical financials
metrics.verificationNote: Annual Report 2023 and official FY2023 Results Presentation agree on revenue, net income, adjusted OCF, capex and FCF. Cash on hand was not separately disclosed for the pro-forma comparison.

metrics.basis: ADNOC Gas PLC; adjusted revenue and cash-flow performance measures with reported net income
metrics.verificationNote: Annual Report 2023 and official FY2023 Results Presentation agree on revenue, net income, adjusted OCF, capex and FCF. Year-end cash is audited in the annual report.

metrics.basis: ADNOC Gas PLC; adjusted revenue and cash-flow performance measures with reported net income
metrics.verificationNote: Integrated Report 2024 and official FY2024 Results Presentation agree on revenue, net income, adjusted OCF, capex and FCF. Cash and net change in cash are audited in the integrated report.

metrics.basis: ADNOC Gas PLC; adjusted revenue and adjusted OCF, company-reported FCF after working capital, reported net income
metrics.verificationNote: Integrated Report 2025 and official FY2025 Results Presentation agree on revenue, net income, capex and FCF. The integrated report and Q4 MD&A agree on IFRS operating cash flow, cash balance and net change in cash.

metrics.basis: ADNOC Gas PLC; midpoint of management FY2026 net-income guidance (USD3.5-4.0bn) and capex guidance (USD4.5-5.0bn)
metrics.verificationNote: Revenue, operating cash flow and FCF are blank because no comparable, directly accessible annual guidance was identified. Values shown are transparent midpoints of the disclosed management ranges.

profitability.title: Revenue and Net Income
profitability.subtitle: USD million
profitability.basisLabel: ADNOC Gas public proxy for ADNOC Group; FY2026 official guidance where available
profitability.sourceLine: Source: FY2025 Integrated Report，FY2025 Results，FY2026 Guidance
profitability.note: ADNOC Gas is the closest publicly disclosed ADNOC proxy. FY2026 shows official guidance only where comparable values are disclosed.

cashInvestment.title: Investments and Free Cash Flow
cashInvestment.titleCn: ADNOC 投资与自由现金流
cashInvestment.subtitle: USD million
cashInvestment.basisLabel: ADNOC Gas capex / FCF proxy; FY2026 official capex guidance only
cashInvestment.sourceLine: Source: FY2025 Integrated Report，FY2025 Results，FY2026 Guidance
cashInvestment.note: Capex is shown as a positive investment bar. FY2025 FCF is the company-reported amount after working capital.

groupPortfolioReference.basis: ADNOC Group six listed portfolio companies combined
ADNOC Group six listed portfolio companies combined

definitions.definition: ADNOC Gas adjusted revenues, including proportionate consolidation of joint ventures where disclosed.
Profit for the year. FY2026 uses the midpoint of official management guidance and is visually marked as forecast.
Adjusted cash flow from operations where the company presents it as a comparable financial-review measure. IFRS operating cash flow remains recorded in source notes.
Company-reported free cash flow. FY2025 is USD4,148m after working capital; do not substitute a simple OCF-minus-capex calculation when it differs from the company definition.
Capital expenditure/investments are negative cash outflows in the normalized data and positive bars in the dashboard.
Year-end cash and cash equivalents, including the company cash-pooling balance where classified as cash equivalents.
Net increase/decrease in cash and cash equivalents from the audited cash-flow statement.
